languages.text: "Как патетично. Было бы мне нужно для экспозиции два Вольных Торговца вместо одного — я, возможно, даже порадовался бы. Но так или иначе — ты приведешь его ко мне".
"Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."
languages.original_text: "Как патетично. Было бы мне нужно для экспозиции два Вольных Торговца вместо одного — я, возможно, даже порадовался бы. Но так или иначе — ты приведешь его ко мне".

traits.locale_text: "How pathetic. If I had need of two Rogue Traders for my exhibition instead of one, I might even take some pleasure in that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."
"How pathetic. If I had need of two Rogue Traders for my exhibition instead of one, I might even take some pleasure in that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."
"How pathetic. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even take some pleasure in that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."
"How pathetic. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even take some pleasure in that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."
"Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

languages.text: “真热情。如果我的展览馆需要两个行商浪人，我甚至会很乐意。但无论如何，你终究会把他带到我面前。”
languages.original_text: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

traits.locale_text: “真热情。如果我的展览馆需要两个行商浪人，我甚至会很乐意。但无论如何，你终究会把他带到我面前。”

languages.text: «Que fervor. Si necesitara más Comerciantes Independientes en vez de uno, hasta me resultaría grato. De un modo u otro, me lo traerás».
languages.original_text: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

traits.locale_text: «Que fervor. Si necesitara más Comerciantes Independientes en vez de uno, hasta me resultaría grato. De un modo u otro, me lo traerás».

languages.text: « Quelle ferveur... Si j'avais eu besoin d'un deuxième libre-marchand pour compléter ma collection, j'aurais même pu y prendre plaisir. Cependant, d'une manière ou d'une autre, vous me l'amènerez. »
languages.original_text: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

traits.locale_text: « Quelle ferveur... Si j'avais eu besoin d'un deuxième libre-marchand pour compléter ma collection, j'aurais même pu y prendre plaisir. Cependant, d'une manière ou d'une autre, vous me l'amènerez. »

languages.text: "Pek bir hararetli. Sergim için bir yerine iki Hür Tacir'e ihtiyacım olsaydı bundan hoşnut olurdum. Fakat öyle ya da böyle onu bana getireceksin."
languages.original_text: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

traits.locale_text: "Pek bir hararetli. Sergim için bir yerine iki Hür Tacir'e ihtiyacım olsaydı bundan hoşnut olurdum. Fakat öyle ya da böyle onu bana getireceksin."

languages.text: "Was für ein Eifer. Bräuchte ich für meine Ausstellung einen zweiten Freihändler, wäre ich damit vielleicht sogar einverstanden. Aber Ihr werdet ihn so oder so zu mir bringen."
languages.original_text: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

traits.locale_text: "Was für ein Eifer. Bräuchte ich für meine Ausstellung einen zweiten Freihändler, wäre ich damit vielleicht sogar einverstanden. Aber Ihr werdet ihn so oder so zu mir bringen."

languages.text: 「こんな熱意。もし私の展示のために、2人のローグトレーダーが必要なら、むしろ歓迎するだろう。だが、いずれにせよ、あなたは彼を私のもとに連れてくるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Such fervour. If I had need of a second Rogue Trader for my exhibition instead of one, I might even welcome that. But one way or another, you will bring him to me."

traits.locale_text: 「こんな熱意。もし私の展示のために、2人のローグトレーダーが必要なら、むしろ歓迎するだろう。だが、いずれにせよ、あなたは彼を私のもとに連れてくるだろう。」
